title: Connected GT
description: CTM-ifies some modern GT textures. (batteries included)
body:
CTM-ifies some modern GT textures. (batteries included)

![View of various items with new connected textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b1ec4a1db7dc392fd9908fa3d23753a62d329ba.png)

Everthing that's been given CTM *should* be in the gallery\*, if something is missing, please contact me on discord\*\*.

\*there are extra textures for LV and MV machine casings that were scrapped but still exist, you can reenable them by removing the .disabled from their filenames.

\*\*I'm @88flare on discord
